name.description: Unique component identifier. Must match the registry filename (e.g. 'button' for button.json). Used in CLI: `centoui add <name>`.

files.description: Source file paths relative to the repo root. The CLI copies these into the user's component directory.

items.description: Relative path from repo root. Must be under src/components/ and end in .vue, .ts, or .css.

componentDependencies.description: Other CentoUI components that must be installed alongside this one. The CLI resolves and installs these automatically.

items.description: Component name matching its registry filename (e.g. 'button', 'label').

packageDependencies.description: npm packages required by this component beyond the global dependencies. The CLI installs these automatically.

additionalProperties.description: Semver version range for the package (e.g. '^1.0.0', '~2.3.1', '>=3.0.0').
